issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
No separate examples section with realistic demonstrations provided.

scenarios.name: nodejs-project-setup
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response B omits key elements such as the correct .envrc syntax, node version specification, PATH additions, and direnv commands.

scenarios.name: python-venv-setup
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric items; Response B omits adding .envrc to .gitignore.
